arabic_text:
بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الرَّحْمَنِ الرَّحِيمِ
قُلْ هُوَ اللَّهُ أَحَدٌ ﴿١﴾ اللَّهُ الصَّمَدُ ﴿٢﴾ لَمْ يَلِدْ وَلَمْ يُولَدْ ﴿٣﴾ وَلَمْ يَكُن لَّهُ كُفُوًا أَحَدٌ ﴿٤﴾
alt_text: Sura al-Ikhlas (Q112) full text in Arabic with the basmala and four verses, followed by English translation paired by ayat number.
notes: Complete Sura al-Ikhlas (Q112). Used as exemplar of Quranic conciseness.
